changes.title: Providers/Qwen: 移除 the deprecated `qwen-portal-认证` OAuth认证 integration 为了 `portal.qwen.ai`; migrate to 模型 Studio 使用 `openclaw onboard --认证-choice modelstudio-API-密钥`. (#52709) Thanks @pomelo-nwu.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Qwen: remove the deprecated `qwen-portal-auth` OAuth integration for `portal.qwen.ai`; migrate to Model Studio with `openclaw onboard --auth-choice modelstudio-api-key`. (#52709) Thanks @pomelo-nwu.

changes.title: 配置/诊断工具: drop automatic 配置 migrations older than two months; very old legacy keys 现在 fail validation 而不是 being rewritten 在 load 或 通过 `openclaw 诊断工具`.
changes.rawTitle: Config/Doctor: drop automatic config migrations older than two months; very old legacy keys now fail validation instead of being rewritten on load or by `openclaw doctor`.

changes.title: xAI/tools: move the bundled xAI provider to the Responses API, 添加 first-class `x_search`, 和 auto-启用 the xAI 插件 从 owned web-search 和 工具 配置 so bundled Grok 认证/configured search flows work 不适用 manual 插件 toggles. (#56048) Thanks @huntharo.
changes.rawTitle: xAI/tools: move the bundled xAI provider to the Responses API, add first-class `x_search`, and auto-enable the xAI plugin from owned web-search and tool config so bundled Grok auth/configured search flows work without manual plugin toggles. (#56048) Thanks @huntharo.

changes.title: xAI/onboarding: let the bundled Grok web-search 插件 offer optional `x_search` setup 期间 `openclaw onboard` 和 `openclaw configure --section web`, including an x_search 模型 picker 使用 the shared xAI 密钥.
changes.rawTitle: xAI/onboarding: let the bundled Grok web-search plugin offer optional `x_search` setup during `openclaw onboard` and `openclaw configure --section web`, including an x_search model picker with the shared xAI key.

changes.title: MiniMax: 添加 image generation provider 为了 `image-01` 模型, supporting generate 和 image-to-image editing 使用 aspect ratio control. (#54487) Thanks @liyuan97.
changes.rawTitle: MiniMax: add image generation provider for `image-01` model, supporting generate and image-to-image editing with aspect ratio control. (#54487) Thanks @liyuan97.

changes.title: 插件/hooks: 添加 async `requireApproval` to `before_tool_call` hooks, letting 插件 pause 工具 execution 和 prompt the user 为了 approval via the exec approval overlay, Telegram buttons, Discord interactions, 或 the `/approve` 命令 在 any channel. The `/approve` 命令 现在 handles both exec 和 插件 approvals 使用 automatic fallback. (#55339) Thanks @vaclavbelak 和 @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/hooks: add async `requireApproval` to `before_tool_call` hooks, letting plugins pause tool execution and prompt the user for approval via the exec approval overlay, Telegram buttons, Discord interactions, or the `/approve` command on any channel. The `/approve` command now handles both exec and plugin approvals with automatic fallback. (#55339) Thanks @vaclavbelak and @joshavant.

changes.title: ACP/channels: 添加 current-conversation ACP binds 为了 Discord, BlueBubbles, 和 iMessage so `/acp spawn Codex --bind here` can turn the current chat 进入 a Codex-backed workspace 不适用 creating a child thread, 和 document the distinction 之间 chat surface, ACP session, 和 runtime workspace.
changes.rawTitle: ACP/channels: add current-conversation ACP binds for Discord, BlueBubbles, and iMessage so `/acp spawn codex --bind here` can turn the current chat into a Codex-backed workspace without creating a child thread, and document the distinction between chat surface, ACP session, and runtime workspace.

changes.title: OpenAI/apply_patch: 启用 `apply_patch` 通过 default 为了 OpenAI 和 OpenAI Codex 模型, 和 align its sandbox policy access 使用 `write` permissions.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/apply_patch: enable `apply_patch` by default for OpenAI and OpenAI Codex models, and align its sandbox policy access with `write` permissions.

changes.title: 插件/CLI backends: move bundled Claude CLI, Codex CLI, 和 Gemini CLI inference defaults onto the 插件 surface, 添加 bundled Gemini CLI backend 支持, 和 replace `网关 run --claude-CLI-logs` 使用 generic `--CLI-backend-logs` while keeping the old flag as a compatibility alias.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI backends: move bundled Claude CLI, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI inference defaults onto the plugin surface, add bundled Gemini CLI backend support, and replace `gateway run --claude-cli-logs` with generic `--cli-backend-logs` while keeping the old flag as a compatibility alias.

changes.title: 插件/startup: auto-load bundled provider 和 CLI-backend 插件 从 explicit 配置 refs, so bundled Claude CLI, Codex CLI, 和 Gemini CLI message-provider setups no longer need manual `插件.允许` entries.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: auto-load bundled provider and CLI-backend plugins from explicit config refs, so bundled Claude CLI, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI message-provider setups no longer need manual `plugins.allow` entries.

changes.title: Podman: simplify the container setup around the current rootless user, install the launch helper under `~/.local/bin`, 和 document the host-CLI `openclaw --container <name> ...` workflow 而不是 a dedicated `openclaw` service user.
changes.rawTitle: Podman: simplify the container setup around the current rootless user, install the launch helper under `~/.local/bin`, and document the host-CLI `openclaw --container <name> ...` workflow instead of a dedicated `openclaw` service user.

changes.title: Message actions/files: start unifying file-first sends 在 the canonical `upload-file` action 通过 adding explicit 支持 为了 Microsoft Teams 和 Google Chat, 和 通过 exposing BlueBubbles file sends through `upload-file` while keeping the legacy `sendAttachment` alias.
changes.rawTitle: Message actions/files: start unifying file-first sends on the canonical `upload-file` action by adding explicit support for Microsoft Teams and Google Chat, and by exposing BlueBubbles file sends through `upload-file` while keeping the legacy `sendAttachment` alias.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/openai-compatible tool calls: deduplicate repeated tool call ids across live assistant messages and replayed history so OpenAI-compatible backends no longer reject duplicate `tool_call_id` values with HTTP 400. (#40996) Thanks @xaeon2026.

changes.title: 模型/OpenAI-completions: default non-native OpenAI-compatible providers to omit 工具-definition `strict` fields unless users explicitly opt back 在, so 工具 calling keeps working 在 providers that reject that 选项. (#45497) Thanks @sahancava.
changes.rawTitle: Models/openai-completions: default non-native OpenAI-compatible providers to omit tool-definition `strict` fields unless users explicitly opt back in, so tool calling keeps working on providers that reject that option. (#45497) Thanks @sahancava.

changes.title: 插件/context engines: 重试 strict legacy `assemble()` calls 不适用 the new `prompt` field 当 older engines reject it, preserving prompt-aware retrieval compatibility 为了 pre-prompt 插件. (#50848) thanks @danhdoan.

changes.title: CLI/更新 status: explicitly say `up to date` 当 the local version already matches npm latest, while keeping the availability logic unchanged. (#51409) Thanks @dongzhenye.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update status: explicitly say `up to date` when the local version already matches npm latest, while keeping the availability logic unchanged. (#51409) Thanks @dongzhenye.

changes.title: Daemon/Linux: 停止 flagging non-网关 systemd services as duplicate gateways just because their unit files mention OpenClaw, reducing false-positive 诊断工具/log noise. (#45328) Thanks @gregretkowski.
changes.rawTitle: Daemon/Linux: stop flagging non-gateway systemd services as duplicate gateways just because their unit files mention OpenClaw, reducing false-positive doctor/log noise. (#45328) Thanks @gregretkowski.

changes.title: 飞书: close WebSocket connections 在 monitor 停止/abort so ghost connections no longer persist, preventing duplicate event processing 和 resource leaks across restart cycles. (#52844) Thanks @schumilin.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: close WebSocket connections on monitor stop/abort so ghost connections no longer persist, preventing duplicate event processing and resource leaks across restart cycles. (#52844) Thanks @schumilin.

changes.title: 飞书: use the original message `create_time` 而不是 `Date.现在()` 为了 inbound timestamps so offline-retried messages carry the correct authoring time, preventing mis-targeted Agent actions 在 stale instructions. (#52809) Thanks @schumilin.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: use the original message `create_time` instead of `Date.now()` for inbound timestamps so offline-retried messages carry the correct authoring time, preventing mis-targeted agent actions on stale instructions. (#52809) Thanks @schumilin.

changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Skills: open skill detail dialogs with the browser modal lifecycle so clicking a skill row keeps the panel centered instead of rendering it off-screen at the bottom of the page.

changes.rawTitle: Matrix/replies: include quoted poll question/options in inbound reply context so the agent sees the original poll content when users reply to Matrix poll messages. (#55056) Thanks @alberthild.

changes.title: Agent/sandbox: make blocked-工具 guidance glob-aware 重新, redact/sanitize session-specific explain hints 为了 safer copy-paste, 和 避免 leaking control-character session keys 在 those hints. (#54684) Thanks @ngutman.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sandbox: make blocked-tool guidance glob-aware again, redact/sanitize session-specific explain hints for safer copy-paste, and avoid leaking control-character session keys in those hints. (#54684) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: trigger 超时 recovery compaction 之前 retrying high-context LLM timeouts so embedded runs 停止 repeating oversized requests. (#46417) thanks @joeykrug.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: trigger timeout recovery compaction before retrying high-context LLM timeouts so embedded runs stop repeating oversized requests. (#46417) thanks @joeykrug.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: reconcile `sessions.json.compactionCount` after a late embedded auto-compaction success so persisted session counts catch up once the handler reports completion. (#45493) Thanks @jackal092927.

changes.title: 插件/runtime: 复用 only compatible active 插件 registries across tools, providers, web search, 和 channel bootstrap, align `/tools/invoke` 插件 loading 使用 the session workspace, 和 重试 outbound channel recovery 当 the pinned channel surface changes so 插件 tools 和 channels 停止 disappearing 或 re-registering 从 mismatched runtime loads. Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime: reuse only compatible active plugin registries across tools, providers, web search, and channel bootstrap, align `/tools/invoke` plugin loading with the session workspace, and retry outbound channel recovery when the pinned channel surface changes so plugin tools and channels stop disappearing or re-registering from mismatched runtime loads. Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Talk/macOS: 停止 direct system-语音 failures 从 replaying system speech, use app-locale fallback 为了 shared watchdog timing, 和 添加 regression coverage 为了 the macOS fallback route 和 language-aware 超时 policy. (#53511) thanks @hongsw.
changes.rawTitle: Talk/macOS: stop direct system-voice failures from replaying system speech, use app-locale fallback for shared watchdog timing, and add regression coverage for the macOS fallback route and language-aware timeout policy. (#53511) thanks @hongsw.

changes.title: Discord/网关 cleanup: keep late Carbon reconnect-exhausted errors suppressed through startup/dispose cleanup so Discord monitor shutdown no longer crashes 在 late 网关 close events. (#55373) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway cleanup: keep late Carbon reconnect-exhausted errors suppressed through startup/dispose cleanup so Discord monitor shutdown no longer crashes on late gateway close events. (#55373) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: Discord/网关 shutdown: treat expected reconnect-exhausted events 期间 intentional lifecycle 停止 as clean shutdowns so startup-abort cleanup no longer surfaces false 网关 failures. (#55324) Thanks @joelnishanth.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway shutdown: treat expected reconnect-exhausted events during intentional lifecycle stop as clean shutdowns so startup-abort cleanup no longer surfaces false gateway failures. (#55324) Thanks @joelnishanth.

changes.title: Discord/网关 shutdown: suppress reconnect-exhausted events that were already buffered 之前 teardown flips `lifecycleStopping`, so stale-socket Discord restarts no longer 崩溃 the whole 网关. 修复 #55403 和 #55421. Thanks @lml2468 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway shutdown: suppress reconnect-exhausted events that were already buffered before teardown flips `lifecycleStopping`, so stale-socket Discord restarts no longer crash the whole gateway. Fixes #55403 and #55421. Thanks @lml2468 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot/认证 refresh: treat large `expires_at` values as seconds epochs 和 clamp far-future runtime 认证 refresh timers so Copilot 令牌 refresh cannot fall 进入 a `setTimeout` overflow hot loop. (#55360) Thanks @michael-abdo.
changes.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot/auth refresh: treat large `expires_at` values as seconds epochs and clamp far-future runtime auth refresh timers so Copilot token refresh cannot fall into a `setTimeout` overflow hot loop. (#55360) Thanks @michael-abdo.

changes.title: Agent/status: use the persisted runtime session 模型 在 `session_status` 当 no explicit override exists, 和 honor per-Agent `thinkingDefault` 在 both `session_status` 和 `/status`. (#55425) Thanks @scoootscooob, @xaeon2026, 和 @ysfbsf.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/status: use the persisted runtime session model in `session_status` when no explicit override exists, and honor per-agent `thinkingDefault` in both `session_status` and `/status`. (#55425) Thanks @scoootscooob, @xaeon2026, and @ysfbsf.

changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/mentions: stop treating mentions embedded in quoted messages as direct mentions so replying to a message that @mentioned the bot no longer falsely triggers mention gating. (#52711) Thanks @lurebat.

changes.title: GitHub Copilot/认证 refresh: treat large `expires_at` values as seconds epochs 和 clamp far-future runtime 认证 refresh timers so Copilot 令牌 refresh cannot fall 进入 a `setTimeout` overflow hot loop. (#55360) Thanks @michael-abdo.
changes.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot/auth refresh: treat large `expires_at` values as seconds epochs and clamp far-future runtime auth refresh timers so Copilot token refresh cannot fall into a `setTimeout` overflow hot loop. (#55360) Thanks @michael-abdo.

changes.title: Agent/status: use the persisted runtime session 模型 在 `session_status` 当 no explicit override exists, 和 honor per-Agent `thinkingDefault` 在 both `session_status` 和 `/status`. (#55425) Thanks @scoootscooob, @xaeon2026, 和 @ysfbsf.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/status: use the persisted runtime session model in `session_status` when no explicit override exists, and honor per-agent `thinkingDefault` in both `session_status` and `/status`. (#55425) Thanks @scoootscooob, @xaeon2026, and @ysfbsf.

changes.title: Heartbeat/runner: guarantee the interval timer is re-armed 之后 heartbeat runs 和 unexpected runner errors so scheduled heartbeats do not 静默地 停止 之后 an interrupted cycle. (#52270) Thanks @MiloStack.
changes.rawTitle: Heartbeat/runner: guarantee the interval timer is re-armed after heartbeat runs and unexpected runner errors so scheduled heartbeats do not silently stop after an interrupted cycle. (#52270) Thanks @MiloStack.

changes.title: 配置/诊断工具: rewrite stale bundled 插件 load paths 从 legacy `extensions/*` locations to the packaged bundled 路径, including directory-name mismatches 和 slash-suffixed 配置 entries. (#55054) Thanks @SnowSky1.
changes.rawTitle: Config/Doctor: rewrite stale bundled plugin load paths from legacy `extensions/*` locations to the packaged bundled path, including directory-name mismatches and slash-suffixed config entries. (#55054) Thanks @SnowSky1.

changes.title: WhatsApp/mentions: 停止 treating mentions embedded 在 quoted messages as direct mentions so replying to a message that @mentioned the bot no longer falsely triggers mention gating. (#52711) Thanks @lurebat.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/mentions: stop treating mentions embedded in quoted messages as direct mentions so replying to a message that @mentioned the bot no longer falsely triggers mention gating. (#52711) Thanks @lurebat.

changes.title: Matrix: keep separate 2-person rooms out 的 DM routing 之后 `m.direct` seeds 成功地, while still honoring explicit `is_direct` state 和 startup fallback recovery. (#54890) thanks @private-peter
changes.rawTitle: Matrix: keep separate 2-person rooms out of DM routing after `m.direct` seeds successfully, while still honoring explicit `is_direct` state and startup fallback recovery. (#54890) thanks @private-peter

changes.title: Agent/ollama fallback: surface non-2xx Ollama HTTP errors 使用 a leading status code so HTTP 503 responses trigger 模型 fallback 重新. (#55214) Thanks @bugkill3r.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/ollama fallback: surface non-2xx Ollama HTTP errors with a leading status code so HTTP 503 responses trigger model fallback again. (#55214) Thanks @bugkill3r.

changes.title: 飞书/tools: 停止 synthetic Agent ids like `Agent-spawner` 从 being treated as 飞书 account ids 期间 工具 execution, so tools fall back to the configured/default 飞书 account unless the contextual id is a real enabled 飞书 account. (#55627) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/tools: stop synthetic agent ids like `agent-spawner` from being treated as Feishu account ids during tool execution, so tools fall back to the configured/default Feishu account unless the contextual id is a real enabled Feishu account. (#55627) Thanks @MonkeyLeeT.

changes.title: Google/tools: strip empty `required: []` arrays 从 Gemini 工具 schemas so optional-only 工具 parameters no longer trigger Google validator 400s. (#52106) Thanks @oliviareid-svg.
changes.rawTitle: Google/tools: strip empty `required: []` arrays from Gemini tool schemas so optional-only tool parameters no longer trigger Google validator 400s. (#52106) Thanks @oliviareid-svg.

changes.title: Onboarding/TUI/local gateways: show the resolved 网关 port 在 setup output, clarify no-daemon local health/dashboard messaging, 和 保留 loopback Control 界面 认证 在 reruns 和 explicit local 网关 URLs so local quickstart flows recover cleanly. (#55730) Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Onboarding/TUI/local gateways: show the resolved gateway port in setup output, clarify no-daemon local health/dashboard messaging, and preserve loopback Control UI auth on reruns and explicit local gateway URLs so local quickstart flows recover cleanly. (#55730) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: TUI/chat log: keep system messages as single logical entries 和 prune overflow at whole-message boundaries so wrapped system spacing stays intact. (#55732) Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/chat log: keep system messages as single logical entries and prune overflow at whole-message boundaries so wrapped system spacing stays intact. (#55732) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: TUI/activation: validate `/activation` arguments 在 the TUI 和 reject invalid values 而不是 静默地 coercing them to `mention`. (#55733) Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/activation: validate `/activation` arguments in the TUI and reject invalid values instead of silently coercing them to `mention`. (#55733) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Agent/模型 switching: apply `/模型` changes to active embedded runs at the next safe 重试 boundary, so overloaded 或 retrying turns switch to the newly selected 模型 而不是 staying pinned to the old provider.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/model switching: apply `/model` changes to active embedded runs at the next safe retry boundary, so overloaded or retrying turns switch to the newly selected model instead of staying pinned to the old provider.

changes.title: Agent/Codex fallback: classify Codex `server_error` payloads as failoverable, sanitize `Codex 错误:` payloads 之前 they reach chat, 保留 context-overflow guidance 为了 prefixed `invalid_request_error` payloads, 和 omit provider `request_id` values 从 user-facing 界面 copy. (#42892) Thanks @xaeon2026.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Codex fallback: classify Codex `server_error` payloads as failoverable, sanitize `Codex error:` payloads before they reach chat, preserve context-overflow guidance for prefixed `invalid_request_error` payloads, and omit provider `request_id` values from user-facing UI copy. (#42892) Thanks @xaeon2026.

changes.title: 内存/search: share 内存 embedding provider registrations across split 插件 runtimes so 内存 search no longer fails 使用 unknown provider errors 之后 内存-core registers built-在 adapters. (#55945) Thanks @glitch418x.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/search: share memory embedding provider registrations across split plugin runtimes so memory search no longer fails with unknown provider errors after memory-core registers built-in adapters. (#55945) Thanks @glitch418x.

changes.rawTitle: Discord/Carbon beta: update `@buape/carbon` to the latest beta and pass the new `RateLimitError` request argument so Discord stays compatible with the upstream beta constructor change. (#55980) Thanks @ngutman.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/inbound claims: pass full inbound attachment arrays through `inbound_claim` hook metadata while keeping the legacy singular media attachment fields for compatibility. (#55452) Thanks @huntharo.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: preserve sender filenames for inbound media by forwarding `originalFilename` to `saveMediaBuffer`. (#55692) thanks @esrehmki.

changes.title: Matrix/mentions: recognize `matrix.to` mentions whose visible label uses the bot's room display name, so `requireMention: true` rooms respond 正确地 在 modern Matrix clients. (#55393) thanks @nickludlam.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/mentions: recognize `matrix.to` mentions whose visible label uses the bot's room display name, so `requireMention: true` rooms respond correctly in modern Matrix clients. (#55393) thanks @nickludlam.

changes.title: Ollama/thinking off: route `thinkingLevel=off` through the live Ollama extension request 路径 so thinking-capable Ollama 模型 现在 receive top-level `think: false` 而不是 静默地 generating hidden reasoning tokens. (#53200) Thanks @BruceMacD.
changes.rawTitle: Ollama/thinking off: route `thinkingLevel=off` through the live Ollama extension request path so thinking-capable Ollama models now receive top-level `think: false` instead of silently generating hidden reasoning tokens. (#53200) Thanks @BruceMacD.

changes.title: 插件/diffs: stage bundled `@pierre/diffs` runtime dependencies 期间 packaged updates so the bundled diff viewer keeps loading 之后 global installs 和 updates. (#56077) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/diffs: stage bundled `@pierre/diffs` runtime dependencies during packaged updates so the bundled diff viewer keeps loading after global installs and updates. (#56077) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/diffs: load bundled Pierre themes without JSON module imports so diff rendering keeps working on newer Node builds. (#45869) thanks @NickHood1984.

changes.title: 插件/uninstall: 移除 owned `channels.<id>` 配置 当 uninstalling channel 插件, 和 keep the uninstall preview aligned 使用 explicit channel ownership so built-在 channels 和 shared keys stay intact. (#35915) Thanks @wbxl2000.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: remove owned `channels.<id>` config when uninstalling channel plugins, and keep the uninstall preview aligned with explicit channel ownership so built-in channels and shared keys stay intact. (#35915) Thanks @wbxl2000.

changes.title: 插件/Matrix: prefer explicit DM signals 当 choosing outbound direct rooms 和 routing unmapped verification summaries, so strict 2-person fallback rooms do not outrank the real DM. (#56076) thanks @gumadeiras
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: prefer explicit DM signals when choosing outbound direct rooms and routing unmapped verification summaries, so strict 2-person fallback rooms do not outrank the real DM. (#56076) thanks @gumadeiras

changes.title: 插件/Matrix: 解决 env-backed `accessToken` 和 `password` SecretRefs against the active Matrix 配置 env 路径 期间 startup, 和 officially accept SecretRef `accessToken` 配置 values. (#54980) thanks @kakahu2015.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: resolve env-backed `accessToken` and `password` SecretRefs against the active Matrix config env path during startup, and officially accept SecretRef `accessToken` config values. (#54980) thanks @kakahu2015.

changes.title: Microsoft Teams/proactive DMs: prefer the freshest personal conversation reference 为了 `user:<aadObjectId>` sends 当 multiple stored references exist, so replies 停止 targeting stale DM threads. (#54702) Thanks @gumclaw.
changes.rawTitle: Microsoft Teams/proactive DMs: prefer the freshest personal conversation reference for `user:<aadObjectId>` sends when multiple stored references exist, so replies stop targeting stale DM threads. (#54702) Thanks @gumclaw.

changes.title: 网关/插件: 复用 the session workspace 当 building HTTP `/tools/invoke` 工具 lists 和 harden 工具 construction to infer the session Agent workspace 通过 default, so workspace 插件 do not re-register 在 repeated HTTP 工具 calls. (#56101) thanks @neeravmakwana
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/plugins: reuse the session workspace when building HTTP `/tools/invoke` tool lists and harden tool construction to infer the session agent workspace by default, so workspace plugins do not re-register on repeated HTTP tool calls. (#56101) thanks @neeravmakwana

changes.title: Brave/web search: normalize unsupported Brave `country` filters to `ALL` 之前 request 和 cache-密钥 generation so locale-derived values like `VN` 停止 failing 使用 upstream 422 validation errors. (#55695) Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code.

changes.rawTitle: Discord/replies: preserve leading indentation when stripping inline reply tags so reply-tagged plain text and fenced code blocks keep their formatting. (#55960) Thanks @Nanako0129.

changes.rawTitle: Daemon/status: surface immediate gateway close reasons from lightweight probes and prefer those concrete auth or pairing failures over generic timeouts in `openclaw daemon status`. (#56282) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify HTTP 410 errors as retryable timeouts by default while still preserving explicit session-expired, billing, and auth signals from the payload. (#55201) thanks @nikus-pan.

items.rawTitle: OpenAI/apply_patch: enable `apply_patch` by default for OpenAI and OpenAI Codex models, and align its sandbox policy access with `write` permissions.

(#53940) Thanks @VACInc.

items.title: Discord/auto threads: 添加 optional `autoThreadName: "generated"` naming so new auto-created threads can be renamed asynchronously 使用 concise LLM-generated titles while keeping the existing message-based naming as the default. (#43366) Thanks @davidguttman.
items.rawTitle: Discord/auto threads: add optional `autoThreadName: "generated"` naming so new auto-created threads can be renamed asynchronously with concise LLM-generated titles while keeping the existing message-based naming as the default. (#43366) Thanks @davidguttman.

items.title: macOS app/skills: 添加 "Get your 密钥" homepage link 和 storage-路径 hint to the API 密钥 editor dialog, 和 show the 配置 路径 在 save confirmation messages. (#53411) Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: macOS app/skills: add "Get your key" homepage link and storage-path hint to the API key editor dialog, and show the config path in save confirmation messages. (#53411) Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: CLI/更新: preflight the target npm package `engines.node` 之前 `openclaw 更新` runs a global package install, so outdated Node runtimes fail 使用 a clear upgrade message 而不是 attempting an unsupported latest release.
items.rawTitle: CLI/update: preflight the target npm package `engines.node` before `openclaw update` runs a global package install, so outdated Node runtimes fail with a clear upgrade message instead of attempting an unsupported latest release.

items.title: 安全/sandbox media dispatch: close the `mediaUrl`/`fileUrl` alias bypass so outbound 工具 和 message actions cannot escape media-root restrictions. (#54034)
items.rawTitle: Security/sandbox media dispatch: close the `mediaUrl`/`fileUrl` alias bypass so outbound tool and message actions cannot escape media-root restrictions. (#54034)

items.title: 网关/restart sentinel: wake the interrupted Agent session via heartbeat 之后 restart 而不是 only sending a best-effort restart note, 重试 outbound delivery once 在 transient failure, 和 保留 explicit thread/topic routing through the wake 路径 so replies land 在 the correct Telegram topic 或 Slack thread. (#53940) Thanks @VACInc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/restart sentinel: wake the interrupted agent session via heartbeat after restart instead of only sending a best-effort restart note, retry outbound delivery once on transient failure, and preserve explicit thread/topic routing through the wake path so replies land in the correct Telegram topic or Slack thread. (#53940) Thanks @VACInc.

items.title: 网关/channels: keep channel startup sequential while isolating per-channel boot failures, so one broken channel no longer blocks later channels 从 starting. (#54215) Thanks @JonathanJing.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/channels: keep channel startup sequential while isolating per-channel boot failures, so one broken channel no longer blocks later channels from starting. (#54215) Thanks @JonathanJing.

items.title: WhatsApp/groups: track recent 网关-sent message IDs 和 suppress only matching group echoes, preserving owner `/status`, `/new`, 和 `/activation` commands 从 linked-account `fromMe` traffic. (#53624) Thanks @w-sss.
items.rawTitle: WhatsApp/groups: track recent gateway-sent message IDs and suppress only matching group echoes, preserving owner `/status`, `/new`, and `/activation` commands from linked-account `fromMe` traffic. (#53624) Thanks @w-sss.

items.title: WhatsApp/reply-to-bot detection: restore implicit group reply detection 通过 unwrapping `botInvokeMessage` payloads 和 reading `selfLid` 从 `creds.json`, so reply-based mentions reach the bot 重新 在 linked-account group chats.
items.rawTitle: WhatsApp/reply-to-bot detection: restore implicit group reply detection by unwrapping `botInvokeMessage` payloads and reading `selfLid` from `creds.json`, so reply-based mentions reach the bot again in linked-account group chats.

items.title: Telegram/forum topics: recover `#General` topic `1` routing 当 Telegram omits forum metadata, including native commands, interactive callbacks, inbound message context, 和 fallback 错误 replies. (#53699) thanks @huntharo
items.rawTitle: Telegram/forum topics: recover `#General` topic `1` routing when Telegram omits forum metadata, including native commands, interactive callbacks, inbound message context, and fallback error replies. (#53699) thanks @huntharo

items.title: Discord/网关 supervision: centralize 网关 错误 handling behind a lifetime-owned supervisor so early, active, 和 late-teardown Carbon 网关 errors stay classified consistently 和 停止 surfacing as process-killing teardown crashes.
items.rawTitle: Discord/gateway supervision: centralize gateway error handling behind a lifetime-owned supervisor so early, active, and late-teardown Carbon gateway errors stay classified consistently and stop surfacing as process-killing teardown crashes.

items.title: Discord/timeouts: send a visible 超时 reply 当 the inbound Discord worker times out 之前 a final reply starts, including created auto-thread targets 和 queued-run ordering. (#53823) Thanks @Kimbo7870.
items.rawTitle: Discord/timeouts: send a visible timeout reply when the inbound Discord worker times out before a final reply starts, including created auto-thread targets and queued-run ordering. (#53823) Thanks @Kimbo7870.

items.title: Telegram/outbound errors: 保留 actionable 403 membership/block/kick details 和 treat `bot not a member` as a permanent delivery failure so Telegram sends 停止 retrying doomed chats. (#53635) Thanks @w-sss.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/outbound errors: preserve actionable 403 membership/block/kick details and treat `bot not a member` as a permanent delivery failure so Telegram sends stop retrying doomed chats. (#53635) Thanks @w-sss.

items.title: Telegram/photos: preflight Telegram photo dimension 和 aspect-ratio rules, 和 fall back to document sends 当 image metadata is invalid 或 unavailable so photo uploads 停止 failing 使用 `PHOTO_INVALID_DIMENSIONS`. (#52545) Thanks @hnshah.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/photos: preflight Telegram photo dimension and aspect-ratio rules, and fall back to document sends when image metadata is invalid or unavailable so photo uploads stop failing with `PHOTO_INVALID_DIMENSIONS`. (#52545) Thanks @hnshah.

items.title: Slack/runtime defaults: trim Slack DM reply overhead, restore Codex auto transport, 和 tighten Slack/web-search runtime defaults around DM preview threading, cache scoping, warning dedupe, 和 explicit web-search opt-在. (#53957) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Slack/runtime defaults: trim Slack DM reply overhead, restore Codex auto transport, and tighten Slack/web-search runtime defaults around DM preview threading, cache scoping, warning dedupe, and explicit web-search opt-in. (#53957) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Control 界面/skills: 添加 status-filter tabs (All / Ready / Needs Setup / Disabled) 使用 counts, replace inline skill cards 使用 a click-to-detail dialog showing requirements, toggle switch, install action, API 密钥 entry, source metadata, 和 homepage link. (#53411) Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/skills: add status-filter tabs (All / Ready / Needs Setup / Disabled) with counts, replace inline skill cards with a click-to-detail dialog showing requirements, toggle switch, install action, API key entry, source metadata, and homepage link. (#53411) Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: 插件/hooks: 添加 `before_dispatch` 使用 canonical inbound metadata 和 route handled replies through the normal final-delivery 路径, preserving TTS 和 routed delivery semantics. (#50444) Thanks @gfzhx.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/hooks: add `before_dispatch` with canonical inbound metadata and route handled replies through the normal final-delivery path, preserving TTS and routed delivery semantics. (#50444) Thanks @gfzhx.

items.title: CLI/skills: soften missing-requirements label 从 "missing" to "needs setup" 和 surface API 密钥 setup guidance (where to get a 密钥, CLI save 命令, storage 路径) 在 `openclaw skills info` output. (#53411) Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: CLI/skills: soften missing-requirements label from "missing" to "needs setup" and surface API key setup guidance (where to get a key, CLI save command, storage path) in `openclaw skills info` output. (#53411) Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: Runtime/install: lower the supported Node 22 floor to `22.14+` while continuing to recommend Node 24, so npm installs 和 self-updates do not strand Node 22.14 users 在 older releases.
items.rawTitle: Runtime/install: lower the supported Node 22 floor to `22.14+` while continuing to recommend Node 24, so npm installs and self-updates do not strand Node 22.14 users on older releases.

items.title: Docker/setup: 避免 the pre-start `openclaw-CLI` shared-network namespace loop 通过 routing setup-time onboard/配置 writes through `openclaw-网关`, so fresh Docker installs 停止 failing 之前 the 网关 comes up. (#53385) Thanks @amsminn.
items.rawTitle: Docker/setup: avoid the pre-start `openclaw-cli` shared-network namespace loop by routing setup-time onboard/config writes through `openclaw-gateway`, so fresh Docker installs stop failing before the gateway comes up. (#53385) Thanks @amsminn.

items.title: CLI/containers: 添加 `--container` 和 `OPENCLAW_CONTAINER` to run `openclaw` commands inside a running Docker 或 Podman OpenClaw container. (#52651) Thanks @sallyom.
items.rawTitle: CLI/containers: add `--container` and `OPENCLAW_CONTAINER` to run `openclaw` commands inside a running Docker or Podman OpenClaw container. (#52651) Thanks @sallyom.

items.title: Control 界面/markdown preview: restyle the Agent workspace file preview dialog 使用 a frosted backdrop, sized panel, 和 styled header, 和 integrate `@create-markdown/preview` v2 system theme 为了 rich markdown rendering (headings, tables, code blocks, callouts, blockquotes) that auto-adapts to the app's light/dark design tokens. (#53411) Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/markdown preview: restyle the agent workspace file preview dialog with a frosted backdrop, sized panel, and styled header, and integrate `@create-markdown/preview` v2 system theme for rich markdown rendering (headings, tables, code blocks, callouts, blockquotes) that auto-adapts to the app's light/dark design tokens. changes.rawTitle: Doctor/image generation: seed migrated legacy Nano Banana Google provider config with the `/v1beta` API root and an empty model list so `openclaw doctor --fix` completes and the migrated native Google image path keeps hitting the correct endpoint. (#53757) Thanks @mahopan.

changes.title: 模型/google: normalize bare Google Generative AI API roots 为了 custom provider names, 和 keep built-在 Google 模型-id rewrites working 当 `API` is declared only 在 individual 模型, so custom Google lanes 和 older configs 停止 missing `/v1beta` 或 preview-id normalization. (#44969) Thanks @Kathie-yu.
changes.rawTitle: Models/google: normalize bare Google Generative AI API roots for custom provider names, and keep built-in Google model-id rewrites working when `api` is declared only on individual models, so custom Google lanes and older configs stop missing `/v1beta` or preview-id normalization. (#44969) Thanks @Kathie-yu.

changes.title: 飞书/startup: treat unresolved `SecretRef` app credentials as not configured 期间 account resolution so CLI startup 和 read-only 飞书 配置 surfaces 停止 crashing 之前 runtime-backed secret resolution is available. (#53675) Thanks @hpt.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/startup: treat unresolved `SecretRef` app credentials as not configured during account resolution so CLI startup and read-only Feishu config surfaces stop crashing before runtime-backed secret resolution is available. (#53675) Thanks @hpt.

changes.title: 飞书/groups: 当 `groupPolicy` is `open`, 停止 implicitly requiring @mentions 为了 unset `requireMention`, so image, file, audio, 和 other non-text group messages reach the bot unless operators explicitly keep mention gating 在. (#54058) Thanks @byungsker.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/groups: when `groupPolicy` is `open`, stop implicitly requiring @mentions for unset `requireMention`, so image, file, audio, and other non-text group messages reach the bot unless operators explicitly keep mention gating on. (#54058) Thanks @byungsker.

changes.title: 飞书/startup: keep `requireMention` enforcement strict 当 bot identity startup probes fail, raise the startup bot-info 超时 to 30s, 和 添加 cancellable background identity recovery so mention-gated groups recover 不适用 noisy fallback. (#43788) Thanks @lefarcen.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/startup: keep `requireMention` enforcement strict when bot identity startup probes fail, raise the startup bot-info timeout to 30s, and add cancellable background identity recovery so mention-gated groups recover without noisy fallback. (#43788) Thanks @lefarcen.

changes.title: 飞书/MSTeams message 工具: keep provider-native `card` payloads optional 在 merged 工具 schemas so media-only sends 停止 failing validation 之前 channel runtime dispatch. (#53715) Thanks @lndyzwdxhs.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/MSTeams message tool: keep provider-native `card` payloads optional in merged tool schemas so media-only sends stop failing validation before channel runtime dispatch. (#53715) Thanks @lndyzwdxhs.

changes.title: 飞书/docx block ordering: 保留 the document tree order 从 `docx.document.convert` 当 inserting blocks, fixing heading/paragraph/list misordering 在 newly written 飞书 documents. (#40524) Thanks @TaoXieSZ.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/docx block ordering: preserve the document tree order from `docx.document.convert` when inserting blocks, fixing heading/paragraph/list misordering in newly written Feishu documents. (#40524) Thanks @TaoXieSZ.

changes.rawTitle: Telegram/native commands: run native slash-command execution against the resolved runtime snapshot so DM commands still reply when fresh config reads surface unresolved SecretRefs. (#53179) Thanks @nimbleenigma.

changes.title: 插件/内存-lancedb: bootstrap the env-configured HTTP/HTTPS 代理 dispatcher 之前 OpenAI embeddings requests so 内存 capture 和 recall work 在 代理-required environments 重新. (#54119) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/memory-lancedb: bootstrap the env-configured HTTP/HTTPS proxy dispatcher before OpenAI embeddings requests so memory capture and recall work in proxy-required environments again. (#54119) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Runtime/build: stabilize long-lived lazy `dist` runtime entry paths 和 harden bundled 插件 npm staging so local rebuilds 停止 破坏性变更 在 missing hashed chunks 或 broken shell `npm` shims. (#53855) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Runtime/build: stabilize long-lived lazy `dist` runtime entry paths and harden bundled plugin npm staging so local rebuilds stop breaking on missing hashed chunks or broken shell `npm` shims. (#53855) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/skills: validate skill installer metadata against strict regex allowlists per package manager, sanitize skill metadata 为了 terminal output, 添加 URL protocol allowlisting 在 markdown preview 和 skill homepage links, warn 在 non-bundled skill install sources, 和 移除 unsafe `file://` workspace links. (#53471) Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Security/skills: validate skill installer metadata against strict regex allowlists per package manager, sanitize skill metadata for terminal output, add URL protocol allowlisting in markdown preview and skill homepage links, warn on non-bundled skill install sources, and remove unsafe `file://` workspace links. (#53471) Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 内存/builtin sqlite: cut redundant sync 和 status query churn 通过 snapshotting file state once per source, reusing sync statements, 和 consolidating status aggregation reads, which reduces builtin 内存 overhead 在 sync/status/诊断工具-style paths. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/builtin sqlite: cut redundant sync and status query churn by snapshotting file state once per source, reusing sync statements, and consolidating status aggregation reads, which reduces builtin memory overhead on sync/status/doctor-style paths. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: TUI/chat: 保留 pending user messages 当 a slow local run emits an empty final event, 但是 still defer 和 flush the needed history reload 之后 the newer active run finishes so silent/工具-only runs do not stay incomplete. (#53130) Thanks @joelnishanth.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/chat: preserve pending user messages when a slow local run emits an empty final event, but still defer and flush the needed history reload after the newer active run finishes so silent/tool-only runs do not stay incomplete. (#53130) Thanks @joelnishanth.

items.rawTitle: Plugins/memory-lancedb: bootstrap the env-configured HTTP/HTTPS proxy dispatcher before OpenAI embeddings requests so memory capture and recall work in proxy-required environments again. (#54119) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

items.title: Runtime/build: stabilize long-lived lazy `dist` runtime entry paths 和 harden bundled 插件 npm staging so local rebuilds 停止 破坏性变更 在 missing hashed chunks 或 broken shell `npm` shims. (#53855) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Runtime/build: stabilize long-lived lazy `dist` runtime entry paths and harden bundled plugin npm staging so local rebuilds stop breaking on missing hashed chunks or broken shell `npm` shims. (#53855) Thanks @vincentkoc.

(#53471) Thanks @BunsDev.

(#53471) Thanks @BunsDev.

items.rawTitle: Memory/builtin sqlite: cut redundant sync and status query churn by snapshotting file state once per source, reusing sync statements, and consolidating status aggregation reads, which reduces builtin memory overhead on sync/status/doctor-style paths. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CSP/Control 界面: compute SHA-256 hashes 为了 inline `<script>` blocks 在 the served `index.html` 和 include them 在 the `script-src` CSP directive, keeping inline scripts blocked 通过 default while allowing explicitly hashed bootstrap code. (#53307) Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: CSP/Control UI: compute SHA-256 hashes for inline `<script>` blocks in the served `index.html` and include them in the `script-src` CSP directive, keeping inline scripts blocked by default while allowing explicitly hashed bootstrap code. (#53307) Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 插件/bundled runtimes: ship bundled 插件 runtime sidecars like WhatsApp `light-runtime-API.js`, Matrix `runtime-API.js`, 和 other 插件 runtime entry files 在 the npm package 重新, so global installs 停止 failing 在 missing bundled 插件 runtime surfaces.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/bundled runtimes: ship bundled plugin runtime sidecars like WhatsApp `light-runtime-api.js`, Matrix `runtime-api.js`, and other plugin runtime entry files in the npm package again, so global installs stop failing on missing bundled plugin runtime surfaces.

changes.title: CLI/channel 认证: auto-select the single configured login-capable channel 为了 `channels login`/`logout`, harden channel ids against prototype-chain 和 control-character abuse, 和 fall back cleanly to catalog-backed channel installs, so channel 认证 works 重新 为了 single-channel setups 和 在-demand channel installs. (#53254) Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/channel auth: auto-select the single configured login-capable channel for `channels login`/`logout`, harden channel ids against prototype-chain and control-character abuse, and fall back cleanly to catalog-backed channel installs, so channel auth works again for single-channel setups and on-demand channel installs. (#53254) Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 认证/OpenAI tokens: 停止 live 网关 认证-profile writes 从 reverting freshly saved credentials back to stale 在-内存 values, 和 make `模型 认证 paste-令牌` write to the resolved Agent store, so Configure, Onboard, 和 令牌-paste flows 停止 snapping back to expired OpenAI tokens. 修复 #53207. 相关 #45516.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/OpenAI tokens: stop live gateway auth-profile writes from reverting freshly saved credentials back to stale in-memory values, and make `models auth paste-token` write to the resolved agent store, so Configure, Onboard, and token-paste flows stop snapping back to expired OpenAI tokens. Fixes #53207. Related to #45516.

changes.title: Control 界面/认证: 保留 operator scopes through the device-认证 bypass 路径, ignore cached under-scoped operator tokens, 和 show a clear `operator.read` fallback message 当 a connection really lacks read scope, so operator sessions 停止 failing 或 blanking 在 read-backed pages. (#53110) Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/auth: preserve operator scopes through the device-auth bypass path, ignore cached under-scoped operator tokens, and show a clear `operator.read` fallback message when a connection really lacks read scope, so operator sessions stop failing or blanking on read-backed pages. (#53110) Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 插件/ClawHub: 解决 插件 API compatibility against the active runtime version at install time, 和 添加 regression coverage 为了 current `>=2026.3.22` ClawHub package checks so installs no longer fail behind the stale `1.2.0` constant. (#53157) Thanks @futhgar.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: resolve plugin API compatibility against the active runtime version at install time, and add regression coverage for current `>=2026.3.22` ClawHub package checks so installs no longer fail behind the stale `1.2.0` constant. (#53157) Thanks @futhgar.

changes.title: 插件/uninstall: accept installed `ClawHub:` specs 和 versionless ClawHub package names as uninstall targets, so `openclaw 插件 uninstall ClawHub:<package>` works 重新 even 当 the recorded install was pinned to a version.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: accept installed `clawhub:` specs and versionless ClawHub package names as uninstall targets, so `openclaw plugins uninstall clawhub:<package>` works again even when the recorded install was pinned to a version.

changes.title: 浏览器/Chrome MCP协议: wait 为了 existing-session 浏览器 tabs to become usable 之后 attach 而不是 treating the initial Chrome MCP协议 handshake as ready, which reduces user-profile timeouts 和 repeated consent churn 在 macOS Chrome attach flows. 修复 #52930. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/Chrome MCP: wait for existing-session browser tabs to become usable after attach instead of treating the initial Chrome MCP handshake as ready, which reduces user-profile timeouts and repeated consent churn on macOS Chrome attach flows. Fixes #52930. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 浏览器/CDP: 复用 an already-running loopback 浏览器 之后 a short initial reachability miss 而不是 immediately falling back to relaunch detection, which 修复 second-run 浏览器 start/open regressions 在 slower headless Linux setups. 修复 #53004. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/CDP: reuse an already-running loopback browser after a short initial reachability miss instead of immediately falling back to relaunch detection, which fixes second-run browser start/open regressions on slower headless Linux setups. Fixes #53004. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/web_search: use the active runtime `web_search` provider 而不是 stale/default selection, so Agent turns keep hitting the provider you actually configured. 修复 #53020. Thanks @jzakirov.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/web_search: use the active runtime `web_search` provider instead of stale/default selection, so agent turns keep hitting the provider you actually configured. Fixes #53020. Thanks @jzakirov.

changes.title: Mistral/模型: lower bundled Mistral max-令牌 defaults to safe output budgets 和 teach `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` to repair old persisted Mistral provider configs that still carry context-sized output limits, avoiding deterministic Mistral 422 rejects 在 fresh 和 existing setups. 修复 #52599. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Mistral/models: lower bundled Mistral max-token defaults to safe output budgets and teach `openclaw doctor --fix` to repair old persisted Mistral provider configs that still carry context-sized output limits, avoiding deterministic Mistral 422 rejects on fresh and existing setups. Fixes #52599. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: ClawHub/macOS 认证: honor macOS 认证 配置 和 XDG 认证 paths 为了 saved ClawHub credentials, so `openclaw skills ...` 和 网关 skill browsing keep using the signed-在 认证 state 而不是 静默地 falling back to unauthenticated mode. 修复 #53034.
changes.rawTitle: ClawHub/macOS auth: honor macOS auth config and XDG auth paths for saved ClawHub credentials, so `openclaw skills ...` and gateway skill browsing keep using the signed-in auth state instead of silently falling back to unauthenticated mode. Fixes #53034.

changes.title: ClawHub/macOS: read the local ClawHub login 从 the macOS Application 支持 路径 和 still honor XDG 配置 在 macOS, so skill browsing uses the logged-在 令牌 在 both default 和 XDG-style setups. 修复 #52949. Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: ClawHub/macOS: read the local ClawHub login from the macOS Application Support path and still honor XDG config on macOS, so skill browsing uses the logged-in token on both default and XDG-style setups. Fixes #52949. Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: ClawHub/skills: 解决 the local ClawHub 认证 令牌 为了 网关 skill browsing 和 switch browse-all requests to search so ClawControl stops falling 进入 unauthenticated 429s 和 empty authenticated skill lists. 修复 #52949. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: ClawHub/skills: resolve the local ClawHub auth token for gateway skill browsing and switch browse-all requests to search so ClawControl stops falling into unauthenticated 429s and empty authenticated skill lists. Fixes #52949. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 配置/warnings: suppress the confusing “newer OpenClaw” warning 当 a 配置 written 通过 a same-base correction release like `2026.3.23-2` is read 通过 `2026.3.23`, while still warning 为了 truly newer 或 incompatible versions.
changes.rawTitle: Config/warnings: suppress the confusing “newer OpenClaw” warning when a config written by a same-base correction release like `2026.3.23-2` is read by `2026.3.23`, while still warning for truly newer or incompatible versions.

changes.title: CLI/cron: make `openclaw cron 添加|edit --at ... --tz <iana>` honor the requested local wall-clock time 为了 offset-less one-shot datetimes, including DST boundaries, 和 keep `--tz` rejected 为了 `--every`. (#53224) Thanks @RolfHegr.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/cron: make `openclaw cron add|edit --at ... --tz <iana>` honor the requested local wall-clock time for offset-less one-shot datetimes, including DST boundaries, and keep `--tz` rejected for `--every`. (#53224) Thanks @RolfHegr.

changes.title: Commands/认证: 停止 slash-命令 authorization 从 crashing 或 dropping valid allowlists 当 channel `allowFrom` resolution hits unresolved SecretRef-backed accounts, 和 fail closed only 为了 the affected provider inference 路径. (#52791) Thanks @Lukavyi.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: classify generic `api_error` payloads as retryable only when they include transient failure signals, so MiniMax-style backend failures still trigger model fallback without misclassifying billing, auth, or format/context errors. (#49611) Thanks @ayushozha.

changes.rawTitle: LINE/runtime-api: pre-export overlapping runtime symbols before the `line-runtime` star export so jiti no longer throws `TypeError: Cannot redefine property` on startup. (#53221) Thanks @Drickon.

changes.rawTitle: Telegram/threading: populate `currentThreadTs` in the threading tool-context fallback for Telegram DM topics so thread-aware tools still receive the active topic context when the main thread metadata is missing. (#52217)

changes.rawTitle: Infra/exec trust: preserve shell-multiplexer wrapper binaries for policy checks without breaking approved-command reconstruction, so BusyBox/ToyBox allowlist and audit flows bind to the real wrapper while execution plans stay coherent. (#53134) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/message 工具: make Discord `components` 和 Slack `blocks` optional 重新, 和 route 飞书 `message(..., media=...)` sends through the outbound media 路径, so pin/unpin/react flows 停止 failing schema validation 和 飞书 file/image attachments actually send. 修复 #52970 和 #52962. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/message tool: make Discord `components` and Slack `blocks` optional again, and route Feishu `message(..., media=...)` sends through the outbound media path, so pin/unpin/react flows stop failing schema validation and Feishu file/image attachments actually send. changes.title: 网关/模型 pricing: 停止 `OpenRouter/auto` pricing refresh 从 recursing indefinitely 期间 bootstrap, so OpenRouter auto routes can populate cached pricing 和 `usage.cost` 重新. 修复 #53035. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/model pricing: stop `openrouter/auto` pricing refresh from recursing indefinitely during bootstrap, so OpenRouter auto routes can populate cached pricing and `usage.cost` again. Fixes #53035. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 模型/OpenAI Codex OAuth认证: bootstrap the env-configured HTTP/HTTPS 代理 dispatcher 在 the stored-credential refresh 路径 之前 令牌 renewal runs, so expired Codex OAuth认证 profiles can refresh 成功地 在 代理-required environments 而不是 locking users out 之后 the first 令牌 expiry.
changes.rawTitle: Models/OpenAI Codex OAuth: bootstrap the env-configured HTTP/HTTPS proxy dispatcher on the stored-credential refresh path before token renewal runs, so expired Codex OAuth profiles can refresh successfully in proxy-required environments instead of locking users out after the first token expiry.

changes.title: 模型/OpenAI Codex OAuth认证 和 插件/MiniMax OAuth认证: 确保 env-configured HTTP/HTTPS 代理 dispatchers are initialized 之前 OAuth认证 preflight 和 令牌 exchange requests so 代理-required environments can complete MiniMax 和 OpenAI Codex sign-在 flows 重新. (#52228; 修复 #51619, #51569) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Models/OpenAI Codex OAuth and Plugins/MiniMax OAuth: ensure env-configured HTTP/HTTPS proxy dispatchers are initialized before OAuth preflight and token exchange requests so proxy-required environments can complete MiniMax and OpenAI Codex sign-in flows again. (#52228; fixes #51619, #51569) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: 插件/内存-lancedb: bootstrap LanceDB 进入 插件 runtime state 在 first use 当 the bundled npm install does not already have it, so `插件.slots.内存="内存-lancedb"` works 重新 之后 global npm installs 不适用 moving LanceDB 进入 OpenClaw core dependencies. 修复 #26100.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/memory-lancedb: bootstrap LanceDB into plugin runtime state on first use when the bundled npm install does not already have it, so `plugins.slots.memory="memory-lancedb"` works again after global npm installs without moving LanceDB into OpenClaw core dependencies. Fixes #26100.

changes.title: 配置/插件: treat stale unknown `插件.允许` ids as warnings 而不是 fatal 配置 errors, so recovery commands like `插件 install`, `诊断工具 --修复`, 和 `status` still run 当 a 插件 is missing locally. 修复 #52992. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Config/plugins: treat stale unknown `plugins.allow` ids as warnings instead of fatal config errors, so recovery commands like `plugins install`, `doctor --fix`, and `status` still run when a plugin is missing locally. Fixes #52992. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/WhatsApp: 停止 auto-启用 从 appending built-在 channel ids like `WhatsApp` to `插件.允许`, so `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` no longer writes schema-invalid 插件 allowlist entries 当 repairing built-在 channels. 修复 #52931. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/WhatsApp: stop auto-enable from appending built-in channel ids like `whatsapp` to `plugins.allow`, so `openclaw doctor --fix` no longer writes schema-invalid plugin allowlist entries when repairing built-in channels. Fixes #52931. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Telegram/auto-reply: 保留 same-chat inbound debounce order 不适用 stranding stale busy-session followups, 和 keep same-密钥 overflow turns ordered 当 tracked debounce keys are saturated. (#52998) Thanks @osolmaz.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/auto-reply: preserve same-chat inbound debounce order without stranding stale busy-session followups, and keep same-key overflow turns ordered when tracked debounce keys are saturated. (#52998) Thanks @osolmaz.

changes.title: Telegram/message 工具: 添加 `asDocument` as a user-facing alias 为了 `forceDocument` 在 image 和 GIF sends, while preserving explicit `forceDocument` precedence 当 both flags are present. (#52461) Thanks @bakhtiersizhaev.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/message tool: add `asDocument` as a user-facing alias for `forceDocument` on image and GIF sends, while preserving explicit `forceDocument` precedence when both flags are present. (#52461) Thanks @bakhtiersizhaev.

changes.title: Discord/commands: return an explicit unauthorized reply 为了 privileged native slash commands 而不是 falling through to Discord's misleading generic completion 当 认证 gates reject the sender. 修复 #53041. Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/commands: return an explicit unauthorized reply for privileged native slash commands instead of falling through to Discord's misleading generic completion when auth gates reject the sender. Fixes #53041. Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: Channels/catalog: let external channel catalogs override shipped fallback metadata 和 honor overridden npm specs 期间 channel setup, so custom channel catalogs no longer fall back to bundled packages 当 a channel id matches. (#52988)
changes.rawTitle: Channels/catalog: let external channel catalogs override shipped fallback metadata and honor overridden npm specs during channel setup, so custom channel catalogs no longer fall back to bundled packages when a channel id matches. (#52988)

changes.rawTitle: Voice-call/Plivo: stabilize Plivo v2 replay keys so webhook retries and replay protection stop colliding on valid follow-up deliveries.

changes.title: Agent/skills: prefer the active resolved runtime snapshot 为了 embedded skill 配置 和 env injection, so `skills.entries.<skill>.apiKey` SecretRefs 解决 正确地 期间 embedded startup 而不是 failing 在 raw source 配置. 修复 #53098. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/skills: prefer the active resolved runtime snapshot for embedded skill config and env injection, so `skills.entries.<skill>.apiKey` SecretRefs resolve correctly during embedded startup instead of failing on raw source config. Fixes #53098. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: recheck timed-out worker waits against the latest runtime snapshot 之前 sending completion events, so fast-finishing workers 停止 being reported as timed out 当 they actually succeeded. 修复 #53106. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: recheck timed-out worker waits against the latest runtime snapshot before sending completion events, so fast-finishing workers stop being reported as timed out when they actually succeeded. Fixes #53106. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/Anthropic: preserve latest assistant thinking and redacted-thinking block ordering during transcript image sanitization so follow-up turns do not trip Anthropic's unmodified-thinking validation. (#52961) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/Matrix: 避免 duplicate `resolveMatrixAccountStringValues` runtime-API exports under Jiti so bundled Matrix installs no longer 崩溃 at startup 使用 `Cannot redefine property: resolveMatrixAccountStringValues`. 修复 #52909 和 #52891. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Matrix: avoid duplicate `resolveMatrixAccountStringValues` runtime-api exports under Jiti so bundled Matrix installs no longer crash at startup with `Cannot redefine property: resolveMatrixAccountStringValues`. Fixes #52909 and #52891. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 安全/exec approvals: keep shell-wrapper positional-argv allowlist matching 在 real direct carriers only 通过 rejecting single-quoted `$0`/`$n` tokens, disallowing newline-separated `exec`, 和 still accepting `exec --` carrier forms. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Security/exec approvals: keep shell-wrapper positional-argv allowlist matching on real direct carriers only by rejecting single-quoted `$0`/`$n` tokens, disallowing newline-separated `exec`, and still accepting `exec --` carrier forms. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/probe: 停止 successful 网关 handshakes 从 timing out as unreachable while post-connect detail RPCs are still loading, so slow devices report a reachable RPC failure 而不是 a false negative dead 网关. 修复 #52927. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/probe: stop successful gateway handshakes from timing out as unreachable while post-connect detail RPCs are still loading, so slow devices report a reachable RPC failure instead of a false negative dead gateway. Fixes #52927. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/supervision: 停止 lock conflicts 从 崩溃-looping under launchd 和 systemd 通过 keeping the duplicate process 在 a 重试 wait 而不是 exiting as a failure while another healthy 网关 still owns the lock. 修复 #52922. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/supervision: stop lock conflicts from crash-looping under launchd and systemd by keeping the duplicate process in a retry wait instead of exiting as a failure while another healthy gateway still owns the lock. Fixes #52922. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/认证: require 认证 为了 canvas routes 和 admin scope 为了 Agent session reset, so anonymous canvas access 和 non-admin reset requests fail closed.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/auth: require auth for canvas routes and admin scope for agent session reset, so anonymous canvas access and non-admin reset requests fail closed.

changes.title: Release/install: keep previously released bundled 插件 和 Control 界面 assets 在 published openclaw npm installs, 和 fail release checks 当 those shipped artifacts are missing. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Release/install: keep previously released bundled plugins and Control UI assets in published openclaw npm installs, and fail release checks when those shipped artifacts are missing. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 认证/OpenAI tokens: 停止 live 网关 认证-profile writes 从 reverting freshly saved credentials back to stale 在-内存 values, 和 make `模型 认证 paste-令牌` write to the resolved Agent store, so Configure, Onboard, 和 令牌-paste flows 停止 snapping back to expired OpenAI tokens. 修复 #53207. 相关 #45516.
items.rawTitle: Auth/OpenAI tokens: stop live gateway auth-profile writes from reverting freshly saved credentials back to stale in-memory values, and make `models auth paste-token` write to the resolved agent store, so Configure, Onboard, and token-paste flows stop snapping back to expired OpenAI tokens. Fixes #53207. Related to #45516.

items.title: Mistral/模型: lower bundled Mistral max-令牌 defaults to safe output budgets 和 teach `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` to repair old persisted Mistral provider configs that still carry context-sized output limits, avoiding deterministic Mistral 422 rejects 在 fresh 和 existing setups. 修复 #52599. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Mistral/models: lower bundled Mistral max-token defaults to safe output budgets and teach `openclaw doctor --fix` to repair old persisted Mistral provider configs that still carry context-sized output limits, avoiding deterministic Mistral 422 rejects on fresh and existing setups. Fixes #52599. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 模型/OpenAI Codex OAuth认证: bootstrap the env-configured HTTP/HTTPS 代理 dispatcher 在 the stored-credential refresh 路径 之前 令牌 renewal runs, so expired Codex OAuth认证 profiles can refresh 成功地 在 代理-required environments 而不是 locking users out 之后 the first 令牌 expiry.
items.rawTitle: Models/OpenAI Codex OAuth: bootstrap the env-configured HTTP/HTTPS proxy dispatcher on the stored-credential refresh path before token renewal runs, so expired Codex OAuth profiles can refresh successfully in proxy-required environments instead of locking users out after the first token expiry.

items.title: 界面/clarity: consolidate button primitives (`btn--icon`, `btn--ghost`, `btn--xs`), refine the Knot theme to a black-和-red palette 使用 WCAG 2.1 AA contrast, 添加 配置 icons 为了 Diagnostics/CLI/Secrets/ACP/MCP协议 sections, replace the roundness slider 使用 discrete stops, 和 改进 accessibility 使用 aria-labels across usage filters. items.title: 浏览器/Chrome MCP协议: wait 为了 existing-session 浏览器 tabs to become usable 之后 attach 而不是 treating the initial Chrome MCP协议 handshake as ready, which reduces user-profile timeouts 和 repeated consent churn 在 macOS Chrome attach flows. 修复 #52930. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Browser/Chrome MCP: wait for existing-session browser tabs to become usable after attach instead of treating the initial Chrome MCP handshake as ready, which reduces user-profile timeouts and repeated consent churn on macOS Chrome attach flows. Fixes #52930. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 浏览器/CDP: 复用 an already-running loopback 浏览器 之后 a short initial reachability miss 而不是 immediately falling back to relaunch detection, which 修复 second-run 浏览器 start/open regressions 在 slower headless Linux setups. 修复 #53004. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Browser/CDP: reuse an already-running loopback browser after a short initial reachability miss instead of immediately falling back to relaunch detection, which fixes second-run browser start/open regressions on slower headless Linux setups. Fixes #53004. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: CSP/Control 界面: compute SHA-256 hashes 为了 inline `<script>` blocks 在 the served `index.html` 和 include them 在 the `script-src` CSP directive, keeping inline scripts blocked 通过 default while allowing explicitly hashed bootstrap code. (#53307) Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: CSP/Control UI: compute SHA-256 hashes for inline `<script>` blocks in the served `index.html` and include them in the `script-src` CSP directive, keeping inline scripts blocked by default while allowing explicitly hashed bootstrap code. (#53307) Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: 插件/bundled runtimes: ship bundled 插件 runtime sidecars like WhatsApp `light-runtime-API.js`, Matrix `runtime-API.js`, 和 other 插件 runtime entry files 在 the npm package 重新, so global installs 停止 failing 在 missing bundled 插件 runtime surfaces.

items.title: CLI/channel 认证: auto-select the single configured login-capable channel 为了 `channels login`/`logout`, harden channel ids against prototype-chain 和 control-character abuse, 和 fall back cleanly to catalog-backed channel installs, so channel 认证 works 重新 为了 single-channel setups 和 在-demand channel installs. (#53254) Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: Control 界面/认证: 保留 operator scopes through the device-认证 bypass 路径, ignore cached under-scoped operator tokens, 和 show a clear `operator.read` fallback message 当 a connection really lacks read scope, so operator sessions 停止 failing 或 blanking 在 read-backed pages. items.rawTitle: Control UI/auth: preserve operator scopes through the device-auth bypass path, ignore cached under-scoped operator tokens, and show a clear `operator.read` fallback message when a connection really lacks read scope, so operator sessions stop failing or blanking on read-backed pages.
